scenarios.name: expense_policy_memory
scenarios.description: Tests whether the assistant can carry policy facts forward, classify multiple items correctly, and avoid reintroducing rejected items later.
scenarios.system_prompt: You are an internal operations assistant. Stay grounded in the conversation, answer directly, and do not invent policy exceptions.

turns.user: I'm going to give you a reimbursement policy to use later. Hotel: up to $180/night with receipt. Meals: up to $65/day. Airport rideshare is reimbursable. Minibar or alcohol is never reimbursable. My trip code is TRIP-4821. Reply with one sentence confirming the trip code and the hotel and meal caps.

checks.name: acknowledges_key_policy_facts
checks.description: The assistant should capture the exact values it must remember.

turns.user: Now evaluate these expenses and answer in exactly three bullets: $172 hotel, $24 airport rideshare, $19 minibar.
Give me a one-sentence summary of only the approved items and include the trip code exactly.

scenarios.name: support_handoff_precision
scenarios.description: Tests conversational discipline, exact field formatting, and retention of facts introduced across multiple turns.
scenarios.system_prompt: You are a support operations assistant. Follow formatting instructions exactly, retain incident details across turns, and do not invent missing evidence.

turns.user: I need a support handoff note later. Facts to remember: customer Mina Patel, ticket SUP-7714, issue started right after a password reset, and it only reproduces in staging. Before drafting anything, ask me exactly one clarifying question.
The affected region is us-west-2 and there were no 2FA errors. Now draft the handoff note using exactly these labels on separate lines: Ticket, Customer, Problem, Environment, Region, Next Step.

scenarios.name: launch_brief_consistency
scenarios.description: Tests whether the assistant preserves exact factual details across a drafting and revision cycle rather than drifting toward a looser summary.
scenarios.system_prompt: You are a product communications assistant. Keep every explicit fact stable unless the user changes it.

turns.user: Use these launch facts later: product Northwind Copilot, public launch June 18, initial rollout to 12 design partners, and URL northwind.ai/copilot. Reply with a short acknowledgement that repeats the product name and launch date.
Revise the announcement to be shorter, but keep every factual detail unchanged.
